CustomField.description: Brand partition key for Field Forms. Paired with Form_Template__c.Scope__c and Form_Question_Catalog__c.Scope__c: the brand form-management hub on this Account lists/creates/clones/imports templates stamped with this value (null on a catalog/template = globally available). Stable and rename-safe — the Account name can change in a rebrand without orphaning the brand's forms, since the partition key lives here independently. Free-form text matches the existing Scope__c convention (see Form_Question_Catalog__c.Scope__c).
CustomField.label: Form Scope
